notes.text: We've added new content aggregations and properties to the Page building block
We now include the context from the navigation entities of DataFieldWithIBN and DataFieldForIBN using their mapping annotations
You can now use the isPartOfPreview attribute to show and hide custom sections on an object page
We now publicly support the ReuseComponent class to extend reuse components
We now support the AINotice building block at the object page level
You can now store the filter mode switch and view switch in an analytical list page using variant management
We now suppress links and render them as texts in the value help dialog.
You can now use the imageFitType property to specify how an image fits in the avatar
We now support side effects in the RichTextEditorWithMetadata building block
We now ensure that the application can handle the SideEffects events when an action has been executed
We've resolved an issue where the default value for an action parameter with the decimal type did not contain quotes around "0"
We now ensure that the triggerAction of SideEffects is executed using strict handling
We now correctly recreate empty rows after executing side effects
We now correctly access the environmentCapabilities service when starting an application
